leadText: The Apricorn Box (Japanese: ぼんぐりケース Bonguri Case) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Apricorn Box allows the player to pick and store Apricorns . Up to 99 of each Apricorn can be held at a time. After obtaining the Apriblender at the Pokéathlon Dome , the player can use it from the Apricorn Box as well.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description HG SS B W B2 W2 A handy box where you can store up to 99 Apricorns of each kind. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A handy box where you can store up to 99 of each kind of Apricorn.
